business_question: Which departments have the highest denial-related leakage?
business_context: Operations teams want to identify departments needing workflow improvements and denial prevention strategies. Leadership wants to understand whether denial leakage is concentrated in specific clinical areas such as Radiology, Cardiology, or Emergency services.

aggregation_logic.Average Leakage per Denial: revenue leakage divided by denied claim count

chain_of_thought: Step 1: Filter claims where the claim status is denied.
Step 2: Group denied claims by department.
sql_answer:
SELECT
    DEPARTMENT_NAME,
    COUNT(*) AS DENIAL_COUNT,
    SUM(REVENUE_LOSS_AMOUNT) AS DENIAL_IMPACT,
    ROUND(SUM(REVENUE_LOSS_AMOUNT)/COUNT(*),2) AS AVG_LEAKAGE_PER_DENIAL
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.HEALTHCARE.MART_REVENUE_LEAKAGE
WHERE IS_DENIED = TRUE
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY DENIAL_IMPACT DESC;
